name: Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp butter to grease cake pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not combine the egg yolks as they will be used separately.
2. Peel, core, and cut the apples into halves. Make lengthwise slits about 1/2-inch deep and sprinkle with lemon juice and sugar. Set aside.
3. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in lemon juice and zest.
6. Sift baking powder and flour together and add to the batter gradually.
7. Mix in milk and rum.
8. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
9. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the batter.
10. Grease a springform pan with butter and vegetable oil.
11. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and arrange apple halves on top.
12. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 35 to 40 minutes.
13. Remove from the pan and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar before serving.
